h372eef0dge5ebg4104g8c05g0fe03569c235: How did you end up here?
h6162a2a1ga07ag43b9gafd5g9a5cf8093e3b: Tell me: have you seen a druid called Halsin?
hd0e3d2e1g74f1g4eb1gab14g5a96aa46a023: Seize one of his hands and break his thumb.
hc7f7fe2fg9a89g4f3fg8609gdb5bfcd7c7f1: P-please... please l-let me out! Th-there's no reason for this!
ha000695cg56fcg4713gb34fg022cc6f1112f: Tell me where this hideout is.
ha2f7b70cgc92ag407cgad25gb6d752976f2b: No! P-please! If... if the g-goblins find out, they'll... they'll kill everyone!
h7fad3b1egf1bdg46fbg8db1gc95992ab3d7d: The Nightsong. What does it do, exactly?
hb28b823agd58eg4c04g91c6gec86db970b7d: I don't know. The boss didn't say.
h0a3871bfg3dabg41c6g976dg70d74b756794: He j-just said some wizard called Lorroakan would reward us if we found it. That's all!
h215325a5g1e1fg4d66g98fcgf89cfd82109a: The pain stops when you answer my questions.
ha7414bc9g3d33g43b1g8babgda53d6cd51df: P-please! You kn-know where the grove is! Th-there's nothing I can tell you... please, let me go!
hf823c966ge900g4075gbe2fgf85f4463d0b9: I'm sorry. I only did it to help you.
h94557b2ag1fe4g4896g946bgcb785ed1aaeb: Help? You... you could have killed me!
h25c3aafagc55fg41a8g8662g89c9b2302ac2: Remira sent me. She said you were in trouble.
hdc00f778gc3c0g4b03gadd6ga6e7e9ac9725: Remira? She's... she's alive then. Oh, thank the gods. I - I need to get out of here.
h319878c2gde1bg418ag9bf7gd0731b2f943c: I... I don't think I can move my arm.
h5dfd09d6g6aafg4e9dg8da8g6d3cd3b9dfdc: This wasn't supposed to happen. It should have been easy...
h64225a6eg74b6g41bbga54cg6bd6d823e5e6: And now they know about the grove. Gods. I - I need to warn them!
hb2874fc1g96aeg4446g8404g7d8eddbc7697: What did the goblins want with you?
h658a4a14g7700g4671gb60eg901f48a600e1: Th-the grove. To the east. They wanted to know where we came from. They'll k-kill everyone. Please... get me out of here.
h2f3814bfg314dg417fgbf22g393adc485b29: The druid Halsin was with you. Where is he now?
h6fea020dg0f3dg4388gb936gf46db18303ff: I... I don't know. He changed into a bear, but... I lost sight of him. I don't know if he's s-still alive.
h4dd89a2fg7240g44abgae43g69d92cfd134e: You came looking for the Nightsong, didn't you?
h42ecbc12gb81bg49a2ga197ga1704c86518f: Y-yes, it should be here somewhere. They said there was a hidden passage underneath this temple.
h7e1777bbg8e59g44e1gaccdg466044a87468: How did you end up in here?
h8a9f60f9gd9a3g436aga8ebg85634a94c092: We... I was w-with a group of adventurers. We came here for an artefact.
hfc0c8825g205cg46afgb70bg17cb7129023d: It's called th-the Nightsong. We tried to s-sneak past the goblins...
h04f9499cg940bg444fgbe01g34bbc89206f2: ... b-but they ambushed us. I didn't think a pack of goblins could be so... so efficient.
h3eb2e782gc807g4607g841cg8d6ffa1d7f7b: An artefact? What does it do?
h86967d67geb36g49c0gb65fg4c2a13a53c2f: He j-just said some wizard called Lorroakan would reward us if we found it.
hffb6a99cg931bg46eeg8a5fg6eec07440ad5: It should be here somewhere. He said there was a hidden passage underneath the temple.
heaea9365g330dg4e70g8f13g4dc14f418a43: The place was supposed to be abandoned, b-but when we arrived...
h35aa6bacgbb8eg494fga892g3729b3d5e696: What else do you know about the temple? Any other treasure?
h033be588ge899g44d6g9cc7g104b1aabdec0: I'm not sure - all I know is there's a p-passageway to the Nightsong.
h744a9fe2ga8c5g4264g80a9g54739dbb21a0: B-Brian had instructions, but... the g-goblins got him. They - they said they'd e-eat him...
h0080e554g56bcg4c75g8c80gcf49cd5e8772: Please! F-free me. Y-you don't need me any more.
hfe8f9a37gd76bg45b0ga6a5g6387f9412f23: One more question: what happened to the druid?
h6acd85e5g1867g4eaeg991cg2260b7d3657d: Halsin? I... I don't know. He changed into a bear, but... I lost sight of him. I don't know if he's s-still alive.
h633b72d9g3d86g413agaa14g921cf5990317: That's all I know! Please... g-get me out of here!

h2b7450b0gc181g4503g8494g88c29fe15f19: Relax. I'm not going to leave you here.
hd14a7c4agf328g44c4gb2abg3a8bfb9dd72c: Th-thank you! Thank you so much!
h111066f4g055cg4736gb1bdg7d20b8b610bf: Exactly. You're no use to me - so rot down here for all I care.
h4261d9fbgef7dg46eag9423g813ecdd7fe24: No... no, please! They'll kill me!
h4148e213g42eag4f75gb237ge29b36d978a6: P-please, these shackles... I... I don't want to die!
hf5d191f7g8eb4g4722gb187g118c12f62d36: Go on. Where can I find the Nightsong?
h8fcf5fd9ga262g4d47gb316ge06c72b9966b: Thanks for the information. Now let's get you free.
h90a26174gd113g45c3g9d2dg0276ea199074: Use the key to unlock his chains.
h1c7f09f4g1417g4b6dgbb01g42bfae6e4367: I can free you - if you're not afraid of a little pain.
hb8c6f07cgcd39g413dg8a62g56f7c3cd06ab: I'm in pain a-anyway. Do whatever you have to. Please.
h8b9b02bfg173dg4ad0g8d59g92e58536444b: Seize one of his hands and break his thumb.
h3d50464fgcb38g49b2gb644g26335e1e558a: Yeeearghh! You broke my thumb! Why?!

h0b7980e8g9083g4cb6gbcdbg3978975d054d: ... what're you playing at? You said on thre-eearrgh!
h0b88b79dgf85eg4d4bgb4b0gf5595a7cc073: ... b-but it worked, I suppose. I'm free.
h503889b9g78ebg4b2ag8ddbgb1d7db17db1a: I sh-should be able to make it to the grove on my own. They need to know they're in danger.
h95470d57g43cfg402egb7b8gb44f6ee00a4d: Tell me: have you seen a druid called Halsin?
h9e057f15g6b3cg48efg8b67g817e235a3533: Halsin? I... I don't know. He changed into a bear, but... I lost sight of him. I don't know if he's s-still alive.
h5329d15cgd23fg4fcbgba3bge521be690391: What did the goblins want with you?
h8c05e11ag8d10g48b0gab5ega54d41086472: Th-the grove. To the east. They wanted to know where we came from. They'll k-kill everyone. Please... I need to warn them.
h182c4b4bg2bbcg443egb0e4gfa15182f65ad: What does the Nightsong do, exactly?
h28921fa2gd3f1g4a0cg8eaaga8d04c537242: I don't know. The boss didn't say.
h8ae40194g2d15g4a97g9f71g8be87709c948: He j-just said some wizard called Lorroakan would reward us if we found it. That's all!
h809e7791geebag44e5g9814gdb33b1d2321f: Ahh... I suppose I ought to be grateful.
hfd91c3a0g1e3fg45bcg8587gf2158332984e: I... I can't. I'm sorry, I just... I can't bear any more.

h2e1dc76bg2a84g4f8fga639gf7baf388d14a: I-it was locked away years ago, somewhere underneath the temple.
hbce2c64fg35edg4b3fgb07ag1604e590dd64: You mentioned the Nightsong. Where can I find it?

hd5def16ag2860g46f9gbff1gfe2e9c640057: But please... please don't tell the goblins!
hf640b0c6gff87g4c61ga470ga23d4be64b97: I came for the Nightsong. Where is it?
